pi_items.source: setup_task.sh code analysis: 'docker run -d --name test-web-server -p 8080:80 nginx:alpine'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires stopping a dynamically created Docker container named 'test-web-server'. Code analysis of the setup script (setup_task.sh) confirms that a container with the exact name 'test-web-server' is launched using the 'nginx:alpine' image on port 8080 prior to task execution.
